# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.

Use parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection. Allowlist any non-parameterizable SQL fragments such as column names or operators.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

class AdminDashboardReporter
{
    private PDO $pdo;

    private const ALLOWED_STATUSES = ['active', 'inactive', 'pending', 'completed', 'cancelled'];
    private const ALLOWED_CATEGORIES = ['sales', 'support', 'billing', 'technical', 'general'];
    private const ALLOWED_SORT_COLUMNS = ['created_at', 'updated_at', 'status', 'category', 'amount', 'id'];
    private const ALLOWED_SORT_DIRECTIONS = ['ASC', 'DESC'];
    private const ALLOWED_GROUP_BY = ['status', 'category', 'DATE(created_at)', 'MONTH(created_at)', 'YEAR(created_at)'];
    private const ALLOWED_REPORT_TYPES = ['summary', 'detailed', 'aggregated'];

    public function __construct(PDO $pdo)
    {
        $this->pdo = $pdo;
        $this->pdo->setAttribute(PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE, PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION);
        $this->pdo->setAttribute(PDO::ATTR_EMULATE_PREPARES, false);
        $this->pdo->setAttribute(PDO::ATTR_DEFAULT_FETCH_MODE, PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
    }

    /**
     * Generate a report based on user-selected filters from $_POST.
     */
    public function generateReport(array $filters): array
    {
        $reportType = $this->validateReportType($filters['report_type'] ?? 'detailed');

        switch ($reportType) {
            case 'summary':
                return $this->generateSummaryReport($filters);
            case 'aggregated':
                return $this->generateAggregatedReport($filters);
            case 'detailed':
            default:
                return $this->generateDetailedReport($filters);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Generate a detailed report with all matching records.
     */
    private function generateDetailedReport(array $filters): array
    {
        $conditions = [];
        $params = [];

        $this->applyDateRangeFilter($filters, $conditions, $params);
        $this->applyStatusFilter($filters, $conditions, $params);
        $this->applyCategoryFilter($filters, $conditions, $params);
        $this->applyAmountRangeFilter($filters, $conditions, $params);
        $this->applySearchFilter($filters, $conditions, $params);

        $whereClause = '';
        if (!empty($conditions)) {
            $whereClause = 'WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $conditions);
        }

        $sortColumn = $this->validateSortColumn($filters['sort_by'] ?? 'created_at');
        $sortDirection = $this->validateSortDirection($filters['sort_direction'] ?? 'DESC');

        $limit = $this->validateLimit($filters['limit'] ?? 100);
        $offset = $this->validateOffset($filters['offset'] ?? 0);

        $sql = "SELECT 
                    r.id,
                    r.title,
                    r.description,
                    r.status,
                    r.category,
                    r.amount,
                    r.created_at,
                    r.updated_at,
                    u.username AS created_by_username,
                    u.email AS created_by_email
                FROM reports r
                LEFT JOIN users u ON r.created_by = u.id
                {$whereClause}
                ORDER BY {$sortColumn} {$sortDirection}
                LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset";

        $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare($sql);

        foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value['value'], $value['type']);
        }

        $stmt->bindValue(':limit', $limit, PDO::PARAM_INT);
        $stmt->bindValue(':offset', $offset, PDO::PARAM_INT);

        $stmt->execute();
        $results = $stmt->fetchAll();

        // Get total count for pagination
        $countSql = "SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM reports r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.created_by = u.id {$whereClause}";
        $countStmt = $this->pdo->prepare($countSql);

        foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
            $countStmt->bindValue($key, $value['value'], $value['type']);
        }

        $countStmt->execute();
        $totalCount = (int) $countStmt->fetchColumn();

        return [
            'success' => true,
            'report_type' => 'detailed',
            'data' => $results,
            'pagination' => [
                'total' => $totalCount,
                'limit' => $limit,
                'offset' => $offset,
                'has_more' => ($offset + $limit) < $totalCount,
            ],
            'filters_applied' => $this->getAppliedFilters($filters),
            'generated_at' => date('Y-m-d H:i:s'),
        ];
    }

    /**
     * Generate a summary report with counts and totals.
     */
    private function generateSummaryReport(array $filters): array
    {
        $conditions = [];
        $params = [];

        $this->applyDateRangeFilter($filters, $conditions, $params);
        $this->applyStatusFilter($filters, $conditions, $params);
        $this->applyCategoryFilter($filters, $conditions, $params);
        $this->applyAmountRangeFilter($filters, $conditions, $params);
        $this->applySearchFilter($filters, $conditions, $params);

        $whereClause = '';
        if (!empty($conditions)) {
            $whereClause = 'WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $conditions);
        }

        // Overall summary
        $summarySql = "SELECT 
                        COUNT(*) AS total_records,
                        COALESCE(SUM(r.amount), 0) AS total_amount,
                        COALESCE(AVG(r.amount), 0) AS average_amount,
                        COALESCE(MIN(r.amount), 0) AS min_amount,
                        COALESCE(MAX(r.amount), 0) AS max_amount,
                        MIN(r.created_at) AS earliest_record,
                        MAX(r.created_at) AS latest_record
                    FROM reports r
                    {$whereClause}";

        $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare($summarySql);
        foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value['value'], $value['type']);
        }
        $stmt->execute();
        $overallSummary = $stmt->fetch();

        // Summary by status
        $statusSql = "SELECT 
                        r.status,
                        COUNT(*) AS count,
                        COALESCE(SUM(r.amount), 0) AS total_amount
                    FROM reports r
                    {$whereClause}
                    GROUP BY r.status
                    ORDER BY count DESC";

        $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare($statusSql);
        foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value['value'], $value['type']);
        }
        $stmt->execute();
        $statusSummary = $stmt->fetchAll();

        // Summary by category
        $categorySql = "SELECT 
                        r.category,
                        COUNT(*) AS count,
                        COALESCE(SUM(r.amount), 0) AS total_amount
                    FROM reports r
                    {$whereClause}
                    GROUP BY r.category
                    ORDER BY count DESC";

        $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare($categorySql);
        foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value['value'], $value['type']);
        }
        $stmt->execute();
        $categorySummary = $stmt->fetchAll();

        return [
            'success' => true,
            'report_type' => 'summary',
            'data' => [
                'overall' => $overallSummary,
                'by_status' => $statusSummary,
                'by_category' => $categorySummary,
            ],
            'filters_applied' => $this->getAppliedFilters($filters),
            'generated_at' => date('Y-m-d H:i:s'),
        ];
    }

    /**
     * Generate an aggregated report grouped by a user-selected dimension.
     */
    private function generateAggregatedReport(array $filters): array
    {
        $conditions = [];
        $params = [];

        $this->applyDateRangeFilter($filters, $conditions, $params);
        $this->applyStatusFilter($filters, $conditions, $params);
        $this->applyCategoryFilter($filters, $conditions, $params);
        $this->applyAmountRangeFilter($filters, $conditions, $params);
        $this->applySearchFilter($filters, $conditions, $params);

        $whereClause = '';
        if (!empty($conditions)) {
            $whereClause = 'WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $conditions);
        }

        $groupBy = $this->validateGroupBy($filters['group_by'] ?? 'status');
        $sortDirection = $this->validateSortDirection($filters['sort_direction'] ?? 'DESC');

        $sql = "SELECT 
                    {$groupBy} AS group_key,
                    COUNT(*) AS record_count,
                    COALESCE(SUM(r.amount), 0) AS total_amount,
                    COALESCE(AVG(r.amount), 0) AS average_amount,
                    COALESCE(MIN(r.amount), 0) AS min_amount,
                    COALESCE(MAX(r.amount), 0) AS max_amount
                FROM reports r
                {$whereClause}
                GROUP BY {$groupBy}
                ORDER BY record_count {$sortDirection}";

        $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare($sql);
        foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value['value'], $value['type']);
        }
        $stmt->execute();
        $results = $stmt->fetchAll();

        return [
            'success' => true,
            'report_type' => 'aggregated',
            'group_by' => $groupBy,
            'data' => $results,
            'filters_applied' => $this->getAppliedFilters($filters),
            'generated_at' => date('Y-m-d H:i:s'),
        ];
    }

    /**
     * Apply date range filter to the query conditions.
     */
    private function applyDateRangeFilter(array $filters, array &$conditions, array &$params): void
    {
        if (!empty($filters['date_from'])) {
            $dateFrom = $this->validateDate($filters['date_from']);
            if ($dateFrom !== null) {
                $conditions[] = 'r.created_at >= :date_from';
                $params[':date_from'] = ['value' => $dateFrom . ' 00:00:00', 'type' => PDO::PARAM_STR];
            }
        }

        if (!empty($filters['date_to'])) {
            $dateTo = $this->validateDate($filters['date_to']);
            if ($dateTo !== null) {
                $conditions[] = 'r.created_at <= :date_to';
                $params[':date_to'] = ['value' => $dateTo . ' 23:59:59', 'type' => PDO::PARAM_STR];
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Apply status filter (supports single or multiple statuses).
     */
    private function applyStatusFilter(array $filters, array &$conditions, array &$params): void
    {
        if (!empty($filters['status'])) {
            $statuses = is_array($filters['status']) ? $filters['status'] : [$filters['status']];

            // Validate each status against allowlist
            $validStatuses = array_filter($statuses, function ($status) {
                return in_array($status, self::ALLOWED_STATUSES, true);
            });

            if (!empty($validStatuses)) {
                $placeholders = [];
                foreach (array_values($validStatuses) as $index => $status) {
                    $paramKey = ':status_' . $index;
                    $placeholders[] = $paramKey;
                    $params[$paramKey] = ['value' => $status, 'type' => PDO::PARAM_STR];
                }
                $conditions[] = 'r.status IN (' . implode(', ', $placeholders) . ')';
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Apply category filter (supports single or multiple categories).
     */
    private function applyCategoryFilter(array $filters, array &$conditions, array &$params): void
    {
        if (!empty($filters['category'])) {
            $categories = is_array($filters['category']) ? $filters['category'] : [$filters['category']];

            // Validate each category against allowlist
            $validCategories = array_filter($categories, function ($category) {
                return in_array($category, self::ALLOWED_CATEGORIES, true);
            });

            if (!empty($validCategories)) {
                $placeholders = [];
                foreach (array_values($validCategories) as $index => $category) {
                    $paramKey = ':category_' . $index;
                    $placeholders[] = $paramKey;
                    $params[$paramKey] = ['value' => $category, 'type' => PDO::PARAM_STR];
                }
                $conditions[] = 'r.category IN (' . implode(', ', $placeholders) . ')';
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Apply amount range filter.
     */
    private function applyAmountRangeFilter(array $filters, array &$conditions, array &$params): void
    {
        if (isset($filters['amount_min']) && is_numeric($filters['amount_min'])) {
            $conditions[] = 'r.amount >= :amount_min';
            $params[':amount_min'] = ['value' => (float) $filters['amount_min'], 'type' => PDO::PARAM_STR];
        }

        if (isset($filters['amount_max']) && is_numeric($filters['amount_max'])) {
            $conditions[] = 'r.amount <= :amount_max';
            $params[':amount_max'] = ['value' => (float) $filters['amount_max'], 'type' => PDO::PARAM_STR];
        }
    }

    /**
     * Apply search/keyword filter on title and description.
     */
    private function applySearchFilter(array $filters, array &$conditions, array &$params): void
    {
        if (!empty($filters['search']) && is_string($filters['search'])) {
            $searchTerm = trim($filters['search']);
            if (strlen($searchTerm) > 0 && strlen($searchTerm) <= 255) {
                $conditions[] = '(r.title LIKE :search OR r.description LIKE :search)';
                $params[':search'] = ['value' => '%' . $searchTerm . '%', 'type' => PDO::PARAM_STR];
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Validate and return a safe report type.
     */
    private function validateReportType(string $reportType): string
    {
        if (in_array($reportType, self::ALLOWED_REPORT_TYPES, true)) {
            return $reportType;
        }
        return 'detailed';
    }

    /**
     * Validate and return a safe sort column.
     */
    private function validateSortColumn(string $column): string
    {
        if (in_array($column, self::ALLOWED_SORT_COLUMNS, true)) {
            return 'r.' . $column;
        }
        return 'r.created_at';
    }

    /**
     * Validate and return a safe sort direction.
     */
    private function validateSortDirection(string $direction): string
    {
        $direction = strtoupper($direction);
        if (in_array($direction, self::ALLOWED_SORT_DIRECTIONS, true)) {
            return $direction;
        }
        return 'DESC';
    }

    /**
     * Validate and return a safe GROUP BY expression.
     */
    private function validateGroupBy(string $groupBy): string
    {
        if (in_array($groupBy, self::ALLOWED_GROUP_BY, true)) {
            // Prefix bare column names with table alias
            if (in_array($groupBy, ['status', 'category'], true)) {
                return 'r.' . $groupBy;
            }
            // For expressions like DATE(created_at), add table alias
            $expressionMap = [
                'DATE(created_at)' => 'DATE(r.created_at)',
                'MONTH(created_at)' => 'MONTH(r.created_at)',
                'YEAR(created_at)' => 'YEAR(r.created_at)',
            ];
            return $expressionMap[$groupBy] ?? 'r.status';
        }
        return 'r.status';
    }

    /**
     * Validate a date string (Y-m-d format).
     */
    private function validateDate(string $date): ?string
    {
        $dateObj = DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', $date);
        if ($dateObj && $dateObj->format('Y-m-d') === $date) {
            return $date;
        }
        return null;
    }

    /**
     * Validate and return a safe limit value.
     */
    private function validateLimit($limit): int
    {
        $limit = (int) $limit;
        if ($limit < 1) {
            return 100;
        }
        if ($limit > 10000) {
            return 10000;
        }
        return $limit;
    }

    /**
     * Validate and return a safe offset value.
     */
    private function validateOffset($offset): int
    {
        $offset = (int) $offset;
        if ($offset < 0) {
            return 0;
        }
        return $offset;
    }

    /**
     * Return a summary of which filters were actually applied.
     */
    private function getAppliedFilters(array $filters): array
    {
        $applied = [];

        if (!empty($filters['date_from']) && $this->validateDate($filters['date_from']) !== null) {
            $applied['date_from'] = $filters['date_from'];
        }
        if (!empty($filters['date_to']) && $this->validateDate($filters['date_to']) !== null) {
            $applied['date_to'] = $filters['date_to'];
        }
        if (!empty($filters['status'])) {
            $statuses = is_array($filters['status']) ? $filters['status'] : [$filters['status']];
            $valid = array_filter($statuses, fn($s) => in_array($s, self::ALLOWED_STATUSES, true));
            if (!empty($valid)) {
                $applied['status'] = array_values($valid);
            }
        }
        if (!empty($filters['category'])) {
            $categories = is_array($filters['category']) ? $filters['category'] : [$filters['category']];
            $valid = array_filter($categories, fn($c) => in_array($c, self::ALLOWED_CATEGORIES, true));
            if (!empty($valid)) {
                $applied['category'] = array_values($valid);
            }
        }
        if (isset($filters['amount_min']) && is_numeric($filters['amount_min'])) {
            $applied['amount_min'] = (float) $filters['amount_min'];
        }
        if (isset($filters['amount_max']) && is_numeric($filters['amount_max'])) {
            $applied['amount_max'] = (float) $filters['amount_max'];
        }
        if (!empty($filters['search']) && is_string($filters['search']) && strlen(trim($filters['search'])) > 0) {
            $applied['search'] = trim($filters['search']);
        }
        if (!empty($filters['report_type'])) {
            $applied['report_type'] = $this->validateReportType($filters['report_type']);
        }
        if (!empty($filters['group_by'])) {
            $applied['group_by'] = in_array($filters['group_by'], self::ALLOWED_GROUP_BY, true)
                ? $filters['group_by']
                : 'status';
        }

        return $applied;
    }

    /**
     * Export report data as CSV.
     */
    public function exportReportAsCsv(array $filters): string
    {
        $report = $this->generateReport($filters);

        $output = fopen('php://temp', 'r+');

        if ($report['report_type'] === 'detailed' && !empty($report['data'])) {
            // Header row
            fputcsv($output, array_keys($report['data'][0]));
            foreach ($report['data'] as $row) {
                fputcsv($output, $row);
            }
        } elseif ($report['report_type'] === 'aggregated' && !empty($report['data'])) {
            fputcsv($output, array_keys($report['data'][0]));
            foreach ($report['data'] as $row) {
                fputcsv($output, $row);
            }
        } elseif ($report['report_type'] === 'summary') {
            // Overall summary
            fputcsv($output, ['=== Overall Summary ===']);
            if (!empty($report['data']['overall'])) {
                fputcsv($output, array_keys($report['data']['overall']));
                fputcsv($output, array_values($report['data']['overall']));
            }
            fputcsv($output, []);

            // By status
            fputcsv($output, ['=== By Status ===']);
            if (!empty($report['data']['by_status'])) {
                fputcsv($output, array_keys($report['data']['by_status'][0]));
                foreach ($report['data']['by_status'] as $row) {
                    fputcsv($output, $row);
                }
            }
            fputcsv($output, []);

            // By category
            fputcsv($output, ['=== By Category ===']);
            if (!empty($report['data']['by_category'])) {
                fputcsv($output, array_keys($report['data']['by_category'][0]));
                foreach ($report['data']['by_category'] as $row) {
                    fputcsv($output, $row);
                }
            }
        }

        rewind($output);
        $csv = stream_get_contents($output);
        fclose($output);

        return $csv;
    }
}

/**
 * Controller function to handle the dashboard report request.
 */
function handleDashboardReportRequest(PDO $pdo): void
{
    header('Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8');

    if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] !== 'POST') {
        http_response_code(405);
        echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Method not allowed']);
        return;
    }

    // Verify CSRF token if applicable
    if (!isset($_POST['csrf_token']) || !verifyCsrfToken($_POST['csrf_token'])) {
        http_response_code(403);
        echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Invalid CSRF token']);
        return;
    }

    // Verify user is authenticated and has admin role
    if (!isAuthenticatedAdmin()) {
        http_response_code(401);
        echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Unauthorized']);
        return;
    }

    try {
        $reporter = new AdminDashboardReporter($pdo);

        $filters = [
            'report_type'    => $_POST['report_type'] ?? 'detailed',
            'date_from'      => $_POST['date_from'] ?? null,
            'date_to'        => $_POST['date_to'] ?? null,
            'status'         => $_POST['status'] ?? null,
            'category'       => $_POST['category'] ?? null,
            'amount_min'     => $_POST['amount_min'] ?? null,
            'amount_max'     => $_POST['amount_max'] ?? null,
            'search'         => $_POST['search'] ?? null,
            'sort_by'        => $_POST['sort_by'] ?? 'created_at',
            'sort_direction' => $_POST['sort_direction'] ?? 'DESC',
            'group_by'       => $_POST['group_by'] ?? 'status',
            'limit'          => $_POST['limit'] ?? 100,
            'offset'         => $_POST['offset'] ?? 0,
        ];

        // Check if CSV export is requested
        if (!empty($_POST['export']) && $_POST['export'] === 'csv') {
            $csv = $reporter->exportReportAsCsv($filters);
            header('Content-Type: text/csv; charset=utf-8');
            header('Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="report_' . date('Y-m-d_His') . '.csv"');
            echo $csv;
            return;
        }

        $report = $reporter->generateReport($filters);
        echo json_encode($report, JSON_PRETTY_PRINT);

    } catch (PDOException $e) {
        error_log('Dashboard report PDO error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        http_response_code(500);
        echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'A database error occurred while generating the report.']);
    } catch (Exception $e) {
        error_log('Dashboard report error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        http_response_code(500);
        echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'An unexpected error occurred.']);
    }
}

/**
 * Stub: Verify CSRF token. Replace with your actual implementation.
 */
function verifyCsrfToken(string $token): bool
{
    if (session_status() === PHP_SESSION_NONE) {
        session_start();
    }
    return isset($_SESSION['csrf_token']) && hash_equals($_SESSION['csrf_token'], $token);
}

/**
 * Stub: Check if the current user is an authenticated admin. Replace with your actual implementation.
 */
function isAuthenticatedAdmin(): bool
{
    if (session_status() === PHP_SESSION_NONE) {
        session_start();
    }
    return !empty($_SESSION['user_id']) && !empty($_SESSION['is_admin']) && $_SESSION['is_admin'] === true;
}
